transcription.text: I was amazed that Dove could make such a difference in my face after only seven days. We asked women to give up their regular soap and take the Dove seven-day test. Well, soap dried my skin. With Dove, I can't get over how smooth my skin feels. Dove is one-quarter moisturizing cream. It can give you softer, smoother skin in seven days. After seven days with Dove, my skin feels soft and smooth, and I feel terrific. For softer, smoother skin, try Dove for seven days. Dove makes me feel good about being...
